name: Peach Pirouette
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over the gelatin in a large bowl and stir until fully dissolved. Set aside.
2. Reserve 3 peach slices for garnish. Place the remaining peaches in a blender or food processor. Cover and blend until smooth.
3. Stir the blended peaches into the gelatin mixture. Refrigerate about 1 hour, or until thick but not yet set.
4. Beat the gelatin mixture on high speed for about 4 minutes, or until it is thick and fluffy.
5. In a chilled medium bowl, beat 1 cup whipping cream until stiff peaks form. Fold into the gelatin mixture.
6. Pour the mixture into a 9 x 3 inch springform pan. Refrigerate for about 3 hours, or until set.
7. Run a knife around the edge of the pan to loosen. Carefully remove the side of the pan and place it on a serving plate.
8. Beat the remaining whipped cream in a chilled medium bowl until stiff. Spread half of this whipped cream onto the side of the dessert.
9. Cut the Pirouette cookies crosswise into halves. Arrange them vertically around the side of the dessert, pressing lightly.
10. Garnish with the remaining whipped cream and peach slices. Refrigerate any leftover dessert.
